title: Prometheus Service Discovery Refresh Failure by Mechanism
dataSources: Prometheus server logs with service discovery errors
app: Prometheus on Kubernetes with SD configs for k8s, Consul, EC2, etc.
spl:
index=prometheus sourcetype="prometheus:log"
| search "discovery" AND ("Failed" OR "error" OR "cancel")
| rex field=msg "provider=(?<sd_provider>[^,\s]+)"
| stats count by sd_provider, host
| sort -count
description: SD failures silently shrink the scrape pool and drop monitors.
value: Isolates which discovery provider broke after cloud credential or RBAC changes.
implementation: Increase log level for SD temporarily; redact secrets in messages.
